features: Let this sweet & spicy pumpkin scent wrap around you to create a warm haven and bring your favourite scent of Autumn into your home
Improve your home fragrance for up to 5 weeks
description: Product Description Air Wick Reed Diffusers use natural rattan stems to delicately diffuse wonderful long lasting fragrances and improve your home fragrance for up to 5 weeks. Create a welcoming atmosphere in your home whether it's in your living room or bedroom with its nature-inspired fragrance and elegant design. Air Freshener. Ingredients Contains: 3-butoxypropan-2-ol, Distillates (petroleum), hydro- treated light, 4-TERTBUTYLCYCLOHEXYL ACETATE, 2-T-BUTYLCYCLOHEXYL ACETATE, METHYLCINNAMIC ALDEHYDE, 3,5,5-trimethylhexyl acetate, LINALOOL, GAMMAUNDECALACTONE, CINNAMAL, 3-methylcyclopentane 1,2-dione, HELIOTROPINE, COUMARIN,
